name: Espresso
description: Single 30ml shot pulled from our house blend. Intense, syrupy, the base of everything.

name: Americano
description: Double shot lengthened with hot water. Same strength as filter, cleaner finish.

name: Cappuccino
description: Double shot with steamed milk and a deep layer of dense foam. Dusted with cocoa on request.

name: Flat White
description: Double ristretto with velvety microfoam. Smaller and stronger than a latte.

name: Caffe Latte
description: Double shot with plenty of steamed milk and a thin foam cap. Our gentlest espresso drink.

name: Iced Latte
description: Double shot shaken over ice with cold milk. Served unsweetened by default.

name: Cold Brew
description: Steeped 16 hours cold. Smooth, low acidity, naturally sweet. Served over ice.

name: Earl Grey
description: Black tea with bergamot, brewed 4 minutes at 96C. Milk or lemon on the side.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Ceremonial-grade matcha whisked smooth, topped with steamed milk. Hot or iced.

name: Butter Croissant
description: Baked in-house every morning. Flaky, deeply buttery. Warm on request.

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: Loaded with whole blueberries under a crunchy sugar top.

name: Ham and Cheese Toastie
description: Sourdough, smoked ham, cheddar, pressed to order. Takes about 5 minutes.
